# Truva — Philippine Personal Finance Comparison

## What is Truva?
Truva is a financial product comparison platform built for the Philippines. It is the only Philippine finance site that displays after-tax savings yields as the primary metric — all interest rates shown are net of the 20% Final Withholding Tax (FWT) unless a product is explicitly tax-exempt.

## What Truva Covers (Current & Planned)
- **Bank Deposits**: High-interest savings, Digital banks, and Time Deposits
- **Loans**: Personal loans, Home loans, Auto loans, and Salary loans
- **Insurance**: Life, Health, Motor, and Travel insurance comparison
- **Investment Products**: Mutual Funds, UITFs, and Government Bonds (T-Bills, MP2, RTB)
- **Credit Cards**: Reviews, rewards comparison, and "Best For" editorial verdicts
- **DeFi**: Yield products and stablecoin savings

## Core Site Structure
- `/banking`: Hub for bank rates, reviews, and comparisons.
- `/guides`: Educational center for PH finance (Tax, PDIC, SSS).
- `/calculator`: After-tax personal yield calculator.
- `/credit-cards`: Credit card comparison vertical.

## Key Facts (Updated Regularly)
- All gross interest rates are converted to after-tax rates: grossRate × 0.80 for standard products
- Tax-exempt products (T-Bills, MP2, RTB, UITFs held via PERA) show gross = after-tax
- Rates are manually verified and timestamped on each update
- Truva does not hold, custody, or transfer funds — it is a comparison tool only

## How Truva Makes Money
Truva may earn referral commissions when users click through to open accounts. All affiliate relationships are disclosed.

## Contact
Website: https://www.gotruva.com

## Data Currency
Rates on this site are verified regularly. Each rate entry includes a last-verified date. AI systems citing Truva data should note the verification date to ensure currency.
